title: McDonald's India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: McDonald's India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, McDonald's India Digital Technologies in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About McDonald's India Digital Technologies:
McDonald's India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India Digital Technologies!
